mode_a_pixel.description: Chibi pixel art for overworld sprites, battle sprites, and tilesets

line_weight.outline_color: darker shade of fill (NOT pure black)

shading.dithering: minimal — used sparingly on large fill areas

reference_dimensions.standalone_sprite: 1536x1024 (upscaled for display, actual pixel art is much smaller)

mode_a_pixel.notes: Characters have large expressive eyes relative to face. Dark outlines use darkened fill color, not pure #000000. Limited 16-32 color palette per sprite. Warm color temperature throughout.

mode_b_mp100.description: Mob Psycho 100 style illustration for conversation portraits, CGs, backgrounds, and UI

line_weight.style: slightly loose and hand-drawn, subtle weight variation

proportions.build: slightly noodle-like, not muscular or idealized

calm_register.eyes: simple but slightly larger than MP100 dot-eyes — small irises with visible whites, friendly
calm_register.nose: minimal — small line or dot, sometimes just shadow
calm_register.detail_level: low — features are clean and uncomplicated

intense_register.eyes: not yet established — no intense-register references exist
intense_register.note: will need to be established with first combat/emotional asset

shading.approach: subtle cel-shading with soft shadow edges
shading.shadow_direction: upper-left (10 o'clock), consistent across all portraits
shading.highlight: minimal — slight rim light on hair, occasional skin highlight
shading.gradient: used in backgrounds (vignette) but not on character fills

backgrounds.portrait_bg: gradient vignette — warm grey center fading to darker edges (dad, mom). OR clean white/transparent (Rikizo)
backgrounds.conversation_bg: semi-realistic interior illustration — warm wood tones, domestic setting, higher detail than characters (MP100 hallmark)
backgrounds.color_temperature: warm — browns, tans, soft oranges dominate interiors

mode_b_mp100.notes: Current portraits are in 日常 (calm) register only. No 覚醒 (intense) register assets exist yet. Character designs are original — not copies of MP100 characters. Dad has spiky hair + grey hoodie, Mom has bob cut + cardigan, Rikizo has messy dark hair + navy school uniform with red striped tie. Backgrounds are noticeably more detailed and painterly than characters, consistent with the MP100 aesthetic principle.

character_identity_anchors.rikizo: messy dark brown hair, navy school uniform blazer, white dress shirt, red-and-navy striped tie, youthful friendly expression
character_identity_anchors.mom: chin-length dark brown bob, beige/cream cardigan over light blue floral blouse, gentle warm smile
character_identity_anchors.dad: spiky dark brown/black hair, grey zip-up hoodie over navy blue t-shirt, relaxed casual expression

shared.japanese_text_in_art: must be verified for accuracy before inclusion
